# Galactic Canvas
## Scripture
"For since the creation of the world His invisible attributes, His eternal power and divine nature, have been clearly seen, being understood through what has been made, so that they are without excuse." - Romans 1:20

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, we're met with a breathtaking canvas of twinkling stars, galaxies, and nebulas. The sheer scale and beauty of creation speaks to the infinite power and divine nature of our Creator. Just as an artist's masterpiece reveals their skill and character, the universe reveals God's eternal power and nature. The intricate dance of planets, the majestic swirl of galaxies, and the delicate balance of ecosystems all point to a Master Artist who designed it all.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the galactic canvas You've created, we're reminded of Your infinite power and divine nature. Help us to see Your handiwork in every star, every planet, and every living thing. May the beauty of creation inspire us to worship You and to live lives that reflect Your glory. As we navigate the complexities of life, remind us that You are the Master Artist, weaving together every thread of our existence into a masterpiece of love and redemption. Thank You for the gift of creation and for the promise of eternal life with You.
